name: Docmost
description: An collaborative wiki and documentation software
compose:
name: slashnode-docmost
services:
  web:
    image: docmost/docmost:0.90.1
    container_name: docmost-web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      - db
      - redis
    environment:
      APP_URL: http://${node.exports.host}:8941
      APP_SECRET: ${secret.APP_SEED}
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql://docmostuser:docmostpass@docmost-db:5432/docmost?sslmode=disable
      REDIS_URL: redis://docmost-redis:6379
      DISABLE_TELEMETRY: 'true'
    volumes:
      - web_data-docmost_data:/app/data/storage
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8941:3000
  db:
    image: postgres:17.3
    container_name: docmost-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: docmost
      POSTGRES_USER: docmostuser
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: docmostpass
    volumes:
      - db_data-db_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
  redis:
    image: redis:8.0.1
    container_name: docmost-redis
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - redis_data-redis_data:/data
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-docmost_data:
    name: slashnode-docmost_web_data-docmost_data
  db_data-db_data:
    name: slashnode-docmost_db_data-db_data
  redis_data-redis_data:
    name: slashnode-docmost_redis_data-redis_data
